label: shoulder4_nighth_fullbody_grid15_scratch5000
display: T1Shoulder4 NightH FullBody Grid15 Scratch model_5000
command: 从零训练 16D 全身策略；腿部使用 T1CircleGridFace6Tight15 的 grid3d_circle 1.5m/s、face6 逐格解锁课程；肩部融合 NightH NoInwardBoundary：roll target_clip/URDF 禁止内收，侧移时最小外展 margin，静止/低速保持 NightB 风格下垂 pitch。
note: Full-body scratch fusion of the model_7000 leg curriculum and NightH no-inward shoulder rewards; no frozen leg checkpoint, no allowed-mask checkpoint, center-to-full face6 unlock.
